title: AE Craft
description: (ARCHIVED, SOURCE LOST) This mod aims to add many ways of (complex but efficient) producing energy, and other resources.
body:
AE Craft is a complicted mod that (is planned to) adds many ways of genrating energy, and processing resources.

Note: due to limitations of MCreator, currently dynamic textures, specifically for the basic tier are not possible. this is planned to change in future updates.
